error.signature: MissingPluginException(No implementation found for method X on channel Y)

verdict.summary: Platform plugin method not found. Plugin not properly installed, hot restart issue, or platform code missing.

dead_ends.action: Run flutter pub get and hope it fixes itself
dead_ends.why_fails: pub get downloads Dart code but does not rebuild native platform code

dead_ends.action: Downgrade the plugin to an older version
dead_ends.why_fails: Older versions may have different bugs. The real issue is usually a missing rebuild.

workarounds.action: Stop app completely and do a full rebuild (not hot restart)
workarounds.how: flutter clean && flutter pub get && flutter run  # full native rebuild

workarounds.action: Ensure plugin is added in pubspec.yaml AND native platform setup
workarounds.how: Some plugins need manual setup: AndroidManifest.xml permissions, Info.plist entries, Podfile

workarounds.action: For custom plugins, verify MethodChannel name matches between Dart and platform
